title: Atlas coherence report CLI (operator snapshot in → report out)
problem: Ticket-289 added atlas_coherence_report as a Python module used from pytest. Operators need a CLI to run coherence verdict generation on an existing private atlas_snapshot.json without writing custom scripts.
acceptance_criteria: CLI subcommand reads private atlas snapshot JSON from --snapshot and writes --out-json (+ optional --out-md) coherence report.
Machine-readable stdout JSON includes overall_coherence_verdict and output paths.
Fixture creativity snapshot CLI run passes; golden + full pytest green.
No public export, public-site, or schema changes.
non_goals: Public atlas route or site UI.
rollback_plan: Remove CLI subcommand and test only.
